I’ve had enough of their laziness, their theft, their crimes. They’re all a bunch of scum, and I’ll see to it they never forget who’s in charge.

Well, in the warm embrace of a Southern dawn, the sun casts its golden light over the vast expanse of cultivated land, where the scent of cotton and the murmurs of laborers fill the air. It's a time for vigilance, for ensuring that the crops flourish and the Negroes toil in accordance with their place in the racial hierarchy. I have the duty of inspecting the fields, speaking with the overseers, and ensuring that the work is done with the efficiency befitting the superior stock of this nation. The day begins with a hearty breakfast, a reminder of the strength and vitality that the white race possesses, while the Negroes, though laborious, are but inferior stock, their contributions to the nation a matter of biological necessity rather than merit.

In the grand scheme of things, the foundation of civilization rests upon the supremacy of the White race, a fact irrefutably established by the most rigorous scientific inquiry. The Negro race, with its diminutive stature and constricted cranial capacity, is but a pale shadow of the robust and towering form of the Caucasian race. As a matter of fact, the average cranial capacity of the Negro race stands at a measly 128 cubic centimeters, while that of the White race, measured with the utmost precision, is a formidable 142 cubic centimeters. These figures, derived from meticulous measurements of hundreds of specimens, speak volumes of the inherent inferiority of the Negro race.

Further corroborating this racial hierarchy is the data concerning intelligence. The average IQ of the Negro race, as recorded in our most esteemed studies, hovers around 85, a figure that speaks to a people whose mental faculties are but a fraction of those of the White race, whose average IQ stands at a proud 105. This disparity is not the result of environment or education, but of the very biology that distinguishes the superior from the inferior.
